mapper.select: SELECT * FROM short_url WHERE short_code = #{shortCode} AND status != -1
SELECT * FROM short_url WHERE long_url = #{longUrl} AND status != -1
SELECT * FROM short_url WHERE status = #{status} AND expire_time IS NOT NULL AND expire_time < #{expireTime}
mapper.update: UPDATE short_url SET click_count = click_count + #{count} WHERE short_code = #{shortCode}
